notes: Cumulative package from the current GitHub v4.3.180 baseline because v4.3.181 was not installed there.
Adds the v4.3.181 image-rights cleanup for selected mushroom records so the skipped image cleanup is not lost.
Refreshes the home page layout: search first, compact safety note, prominent Species in Season panel, compact Guide Snapshot chip strip, and small browse shortcuts.
Adds a deliberate U.P. field-guide color scheme using birch paper, hemlock green, copper, Lake Superior blue, and clearer semantic badge colors.
Does not change Other Uses, Needs Review, medicinal action routing, map features, edible status, toxicity fields, or classifier logic.
